title: Development Setup
text: R >= 4.1.0 RStudio (recommended) Git

title: Development Setup
text: Clone repository open cyclestatsv2.Rproj RStudio. Opening .Rproj file ensures working directory, build tools, package settings configured correctly.

title: Development Setup
text: devtools already installed:

title: Development Setup
text: installs everything declared DESCRIPTION — runtime dependencies (Imports), optional dependencies (Suggests), build-time tools roxygen2, testthat, lintr, styler. safe re-run time; already-installed packages skipped.

title: Development Setup
text: Use Build → Install RStudio, run:

title: Development Setup
text: app reads Strava bulk export. Place activities.csv : obtain file, log Strava go Account → Download Delete Account → Request Archive. resulting zip contains activities.csv. app expects standard Strava export column layout retains rows Activity Type == "Ride". Distances converted kilometres miles automatically.

title: Development Setup
text: development, load package source rather installed copy: Alternatively, open app.R click Run App button RStudio. also calls pkgload::load_all() hood via golem.

title: Development Setup
text: dev/ scripts follow standard golem workflow:

title: Development Setup
code: # Regenerate documentation from roxygen2 comments devtools::document()  # Run R CMD CHECK devtools::check()  # Lint the codebase lintr::lint_package()  # Auto-format code styler::style_pkg()

title: Development Setup
text: included Dockerfile packages app dependencies self-contained image based rocker/r-ver. app listens port 3838 inside container.

title: Development Setup
text: Docker installed running — Docker Desktop Windows/macOS, Docker Engine Linux Docker Hub account push access esimms999/cyclestatsv2 data file present inst/extdata/activities.csv building — copied image build time

title: Development Setup
text: Run repository root (Dockerfile lives): tag specific version alongside latest:
code: docker build -t esimms999/cyclestatsv2:latest . docker build -t esimms999/cyclestatsv2:latest -t esimms999/cyclestatsv2:2.00 .

title: Development Setup
text: Log (required per session), push: also tagged version:
code: docker login docker push esimms999/cyclestatsv2:latest docker push esimms999/cyclestatsv2:2.00

title: Development Setup
text: Pull run Docker Hub: open http://localhost:3838 browser. --rm flag removes container automatically stops. run background instead: Stop remove background container done:
code: docker run --rm -p 3838:3838 esimms999/cyclestatsv2:latest docker run -d --name cyclestatsv2 -p 3838:3838 esimms999/cyclestatsv2:latest docker stop cyclestatsv2 && docker rm cyclestatsv2

code: @Manual{,   title = {cyclestatsv2: Analysis of Cycling Rides},   author = {E. Simms},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 2.01},   url = {https://esimms999.github.io/cyclestatsv2/}, }

title: Analysis of Cycling Rides
text: Analysis Cycling Rides

title: Analysis of Cycling Rides
text: cyclestatsv2 Shiny application exploring analyzing personal cycling ride data. built R package using golem framework draws pre-downloaded Strava activity data.

title: Analysis of Cycling Rides
text: app sidebar layout year filter three main tabs: Sidebar — Filter analysis one years. Summary value boxes display total number rides miles selected years. Graph tab — interactive bar chart (powered plotly) showing total miles ridden per month. Hovering shows year-month, distance, ride count. Table tab — searchable, sortable data table individual ride activities. tab — Background information app.

title: Analysis of Cycling Rides
text: Clone repository open cyclestatsv2.Rproj RStudio. install devtools needed install package dependencies: install_dev_deps() installs everything listed Imports, Suggests, build-time tools (e.g. roxygen2, testthat, lintr). safe re-run unsure already installed. dependencies place, build install package via Build → Install RStudio, : See Development Setup article full workflow including data file setup common dev tasks.
code: install.packages("devtools")   # skip if already installed devtools::install_dev_deps() devtools::install()

title: Analysis of Cycling Rides
text: use Run App button RStudio app.R open.

title: Analysis of Cycling Rides
text: app reads pre-downloaded activities.csv exported Strava. Place file : standard Strava bulk export format (available Strava account settings Account → Download Delete Account). app uses following columns position name: rows Activity Type == "Ride" retained. Distances converted kilometres miles.

title: Analysis of Cycling Rides
text: Key packages used: UI/App: shiny, bslib, bsicons, shinyjs Data: dplyr, readr, lubridate, stringr Visualization: ggplot2, plotly Tables: DT
